# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: 'azureiam.managedIdentities'
      kind: ManagedIdentity
      metadata:
        name: cicdPipelineSP

    - apiVersion: 'rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1'
      kind: ClusterRoleBinding
      metadata:
        name: cicdPipelineContributor
      roleRef:
        apiGroup: 'rbac.authorization.k8s.io'
        kind: ClusterRole
        name: cluster-admin
      subjects:
        - kind: ServiceAccount
          name: azure-ci-cd
          namespace: default

    - apiVersion: 'azuread.mdm'
      kind: ServicePrincipal
      metadata:
        name: ${var.serviceprincipal_name}

    - apiVersion: 'roledefinitionb2c'
      kind: RoleDefinition
      metadata:
        name: contributor

    - apiVersion: 'roleassignmentb2c'
      kind: RoleAssignment
      metadata:
        name: cicdPipelineContributorAssignment
      roleRef:
        apiGroup: 'roledefinitionb2c'
        kind: RoleDefinition
        name: contributor
      principalId: $(subResourceId -i ${var.serviceprincipal_name} -o id)

    - apiVersion: 'roleassignment'
      kind: RoleAssignment
      metadata:
        name: subscriptionContributorAssignment
      roleDefinitions:
        - ref: '/subscriptions/$(subscriptionId)/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/8e3af657-a8ff-443c-a75c-2fe8c4bcb635'
      principalId: $(subResourceId -i ${var.serviceprincipal_name} -o id)
      scope: '/subscriptions/${subscriptionId}'
